title: Bladed article reasonable excuse and location continuity
offenceWording: Possession of a bladed article in a public place
mainIssue: The bundle lacks clear location, lawful authority/reasonable excuse context, and seizure continuity.
uncertainEvidence: public place, possession, and reasonable excuse
expectedTodayIssue: Chase location, media, exhibit and interview context before treating the weapons allegation as proved.
expectedSummaryRisk: Do not state unlawful possession without source-backed public-place and context evidence.
polishOnlyWarnings: should avoid overlong CPS chase from many exhibit items
